title: 6 PcsCase for Baby Dummy Case, Pacifier Case, Pacifier Holder Storage Box, BPA-Free Dummy Container, Soother Pod Holder Box for Travel Home
features: 【Premium Material】The baby dummy holder case is made of outstanding food-grade PP plastic material with smooth edges, which is BPA-free, safe, and non-toxic for use.
【Safe & Useful】The surface of the dummy container does not adhere to contaminants. Store extra nipples and protect them from dust, dirt, debris, etc.
【Easy to Clean】The material of this baby dummy storage box making them extremely easy to clean. The stay-close top keeps the pacifier case securely shut, useful for mothers.

【Wide Applications】The portable pacifier box for holding baby's soother both at home and travel. A Pacifier container is perfect for looking after your baby's pacifier dummy soother or pacifier accessories.
【What You Will Get】You will receive a total of 6 pcs soother holder cases, 4 pcs in white, 1 pc in blue, 1 pcs in pink, size in 71*58*63 mm/2.8*2.3*2.5 inches. Compact size, portable and convenient.
